title: EasyTABpl
description: Customizable Minecraft TAB menu with placeholders, colors, and dynamic player info.
body:
⚡ EasyTAB Plugin ⚡
                   
-----------------------------------------------------

EasyTAB is a fully configurable Minecraft TAB menu plugin for Paper, Spigot, Purpur, Bukkit, and Folia (1.21–1.21.11). Display server name, welcome messages, online players, memory usage, time, ping, and website links. Fully customizable headers, footers, line order, colors, and bold text via config.yml. Perfect for a professional and polished player experience.

![Easy Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7272651ac58edc794ebeb2eb990bbc7a54222325.png)

📌 Features:
- Fully customizable TAB menu
- Dynamic placeholders: %player%, %online%, %max%, %ping%, %date%, %time%, %usedram%, %maxram%, %website%
- Supports Paper, Spigot, Purpur, Bukkit, Folia
- Flexible header & footer lines
- Color & bold text support

![EasyTab TAB](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e62cd1de553b4ba9ff99c6da96f064e5ff460339.png)

📝 Changelog:
- v1.0 – Initial release
- v1.1 – Added full placeholder support
- v1.2 – Flexible header/footer configurable
- v1.3 – Performance improvements
- v1.4 – Bug fixes & layout improvements

📂 Download: [[ModrithDownload](https://modrinth.com/plugin/easytabpl)](#)
💬 Discord: [[Discord](https://discord.gg/n6A3nc3EW7)](#)

==========================================================
